examples: He had friends in Lyme Regis, so he moved there-- first to a shack, then a yurt in a friend's garden, and then the clifftop home where he lives today.
The central royal courts at Westminster developed gradually from the administrative functions of the Curia Regis.
500th Hotel in North America: The St. Regis Atlanta.
On a Friday night, the St Regis' stodgy Astor Court restaurant was nearly empty.
Socialites and business travellers mingle in the sprawling lobby and the buzzy St Regis Bar.
